name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: New notification bell in the top bar of every page — it rings and shows a red dot when an update is ready.
The old pop-up update banner is gone; tap the bell to see updates instead.
The bell shows the new version number, simple steps to update, and what changed.
Bank active/inactive switches, edits and deletes now sync across all your devices.
